p.em: High-throughput inter-process messaging with sub-microsecond latency

ol.li: Atomic: No locks; uses MFENCE on x86_64

ul.li: Logic: Prevents False Sharing between Producer and Consumer cores.

div.p: Topic Namespace Map root ├─ stocks (ID: 0x1) │ ├─ AAPL (ID: 0xA1) │ └─ MSFT (ID: 0xA2) └─ telemetry (ID: 0x2)

ul.li: Process B: 0x7f1000000 (RO) Zero-copy via page table aliasing
